localization.description: New file — MoonshotClient extending OpenAIClient (same pattern as NvidiaClient)
New file — str Enum with all Moonshot model IDs
Add 'moonshot' and 'kimi' entries pointing to MoonshotClient
Parent class — inherits ask(), ask_stream(), invoke(), _chat_completion(), get_client(), tool calling, streaming, structured output, vision
Pattern analog — extend OpenAIClient, override _chat_completion(), add thinking mode via contextvars
New file — unit tests for MoonshotClient

constraints.description: Moonshot is OpenAI-compatible but K-series models reject temperature/top_p/n/penalties — must strip these from requests
Three thinking mode variants: reasoning_effort (K3), thinking dict (K2.6), always-on (K2.7-code). Must handle all three.
Usage info in choices[0].usage not top-level usage — may need streaming override
No HTTP URL images — only base64 and ms:// file references. Video support via video_url type.
Kimi models already available via Nvidia and Groq gateways — direct Moonshot client adds native access, newer models (K3), and Moonshot-specific features (prompt_cache_key, partial mode)

hypotheses.statement: MoonshotClient should extend OpenAIClient with the NvidiaClient pattern: override __init__ for base_url/api_key, override _chat_completion() for parameter stripping and thinking mode, add ask()/ask_stream() wrappers for thinking kwargs
hypotheses.reasoning: NvidiaClient is 254 lines and handles identical concerns (OpenAI-compatible endpoint with thinking mode). Moonshot adds parameter stripping as the main divergence.

claims.text: K-series models require parameter stripping in _chat_completion()
Thinking mode uses contextvars pattern from NvidiaClient
Context caching is automatic — no _apply_cache_hints() override needed
Vision inherits from OpenAIClient base64 handling — needs URL-blocking guard
Model enum follows parrot/models/ pattern with str Enum
Streaming usage location difference may need _chat_completion override for stream mode

recommended_next_command.rationale: High-confidence localization with clear pattern analog (NvidiaClient). All API details documented. Ready for full spec.
